chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1558 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 17.10.2016. Mr. Wilayat Ali Khan Magsi, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Asad Jehangir Arain, Advocate for respondents No.1 to 3. Mr. Allah Bachayo Soomro, Additional A.G a/w SHO P.S Mangli District Sanghar = Today Mst. Asma detenue is present alongwith Jamil Ahmed/respondent No.1. On query, Mst. Asma has specifically stated that she has contracted marriage with Jamil Ahmed/respondent No.1 out of her freewill and she was never subjected to forced conversion to Islam. The instant petition can be disposed of by the following consent order:- 1. The alleged detenue Mst. Asma today will meet her parents in the office of learned Additional A.G, however, concerned SHO will be present there in order to avoid any untoward incident. 2. Since the matter is already sub judice before the learned Court of IInd Additional Sessions Judge, Sanghar and the application under Section 265-K Cr.P.C is pending, therefore, parties are at liberty to agitate their respective grievances before the concerned Court. In view of above terms, the instant constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
